title: Leitstand role docs and AI context alignment
goal: Align README, docs/index.md, docs/data-flow.md, repo.meta.yaml and .ai-context.yml with the current operator ecosystem and WGX-profile decision, and correct the stale start command documentation.

acceptance.assertion: Docs no longer present the old metarepo/wgx/semantAH-only role list as the current complete ecosystem.
.ai-context.yml no longer says Leitstand is profile-free and agrees with docs/decisions/wgx-leitstand.md.
README installation/run instructions name scripts that actually exist in package.json, or package.json adds the documented script.

metadata.priority_reason: P2: agent and human entrypoints currently contradict live repo state
